							(LocalizedLabelId, LocalizedLabelRowId, LanguageId, ObjectId,
							 ObjectColumnName, Label, SolutionId, ComponentState, OverwriteTime, LabelTypeCode)
						  SELECT
							 LocalizedLabelId, @LocalizedLabelRowIdValue, LanguageId, ObjectId,
							 ObjectColumnName, @LabelValue, @SolutionId, @ComponentStatePublished, @OverwriteTime, LabelTypeCode
						  FROM LocalizedLabel where ObjectId = @ObjectIdValue
							AND OverwriteTime = 0
							AND ObjectC

INSERT into LocalizedLabel
							(LocalizedLabelId, LocalizedLabelRowId, LanguageId, ObjectId,
							 ObjectColumnName, Label, SolutionId, ComponentState, OverwriteTime, LabelTypeCode)
						VALUES
							(@LocalizedLabelIdValue,  @LocalizedLabelRowIdValue, @LanguageIdValue, @ObjectIdValue,

matched_strings:
SELECT DISTINCT a.SolutionId AS ObjectSolutionId, l.SolutionId AS LabelSolutionId, a.AttributeId AS ObjectId FROM Attribute a 
										JOIN Entity e ON a.EntityId = e.EntityId
										JOIN LocalizedLabel l ON a.AttributeId = l.ObjectId
										WHERE (e.SolutionId = @CurrentSolutionId AND a.IsCustomField <> '1'
										AND a.Name IN ('createdon', 'createdby', 'modifiedon', 'modifiedby', 'createdonbehalfby', 'modifiedonbehalfby','owneridyominame',
										'exchangerate','statecode',
name: Microsoft.Crm.Tools.LangProvisioning.LanguageActivation::RetrieveMissingLabelsForAttributes
